---
title: "Who We Are"
toc: true
listing:
  - id: wp1-listing
    contents: data/people-wp1.yml
    template: includes/_people.ejs.html
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
  - id: wp2-listing
    contents: data/people-wp2.yml
    template: includes/_people.ejs.html
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
  - id: wp3-listing
    contents: data/people-wp3.yml
    template: includes/_people.ejs.html
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
  - id: wp4-listing
    contents: data/people-wp4.yml
    template: includes/_people.ejs.html
    sort:
      - role desc
      - name
---

DP-Next will be carried out by a cross-disciplinary team of
epidemiologists, clinicians, health scientists and data scientists
across all seven Steno Diabetes Centres.

## Work package 1 {#wp1}

::: {#wp1-listing}
:::

## Work package 2 {#wp2}

::: {#wp2-listing}
:::

## Work package 3 {#wp3}

::: {#wp3-listing}
:::

## Work package 4 {#wp4}

::: {#wp4-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<style>
.card-img {
  display: inline-block;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
}
</style>
```
